Triggering the system-level 'medium-sized enterprise' myth-busting and '0-employee community 3rd-floor electrical grocery store' physical demotion probe. The extremely absurd Apple multinational OEM template in the original data has been completely removed. This enterprise, named 'Suhui Electric,' once again mocked the official system at the data level: because its injected capital was 9.88 million (almost 10 million), the official big data algorithm directly and forcefully promoted it to a 'Medium-sized Enterprise,' firmly placing it on the throne of 'Electrical Machinery and Equipment Manufacturing.' Its business license is filled with vocabulary requiring heavy-asset workshops: 'processing of busways, cable trays, and high-voltage testing equipment.' However, the forensic logic engine mercilessly tore off this fig leaf: this is a grand 'medium-sized manufacturing enterprise,' but the insured headcount is an absolute 0! The paid-in capital is only 900,000. The most fatal blow comes from its extremely cramped spatial coordinates: 'Room 308, 3rd Floor, No. 9 Shiyang Road, Zhangcun Community.' The logical deduction instantly turned into a farce: in a small 3rd-floor single room of a building in a street community, the boss hasn't hired a single assembler, holding 900,000 RMB, claiming to have built a medium-sized heavy industry base capable of processing 'busways, high-voltage testing equipment, and cable trays'? Even more hilarious is that in the latter half of the license, it surprisingly started selling 'dust filter bags, water pumps, and ceramics.' The probe mercilessly deleted all its illusions about being a 'medium-sized manufacturing entity,' extracting the actual work it can do on the 3rd floor of the community: 'sales agency for various electrical equipment, insulating materials, and hardware sundries (proxy broker).' The truth is starkly naked: this is a 100% pure 0-Employee Electrical Eq. & Hardware Broker Shell operating as a community shell. The boss is highly likely a purchasing middleman running around construction sites; writing the registered capital as 9.88 million was purely to meet the thresholds of certain engineering bids. The official 'Medium-sized Electrical Manufacturing Entity' tag is yet another disastrous crash of the algorithm when facing false capital.
